title: sphaerostigma contortum var. pubens
intro: Sphaerostigma contortum var. pubens, also known as 'Blue Bush', is a small shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small blue or white flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostigma contortum var. pubens include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a tincture or ointment, and are often used to treat various health issues.
